---
title: "idkl"
author: "Joey Frost-Xenopoulos - 0730136"
date: "2025-02-01"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
library(magick)

server_dir <- normalizePath(
  Sys.getenv("MAGNETO_SERVER_DIR", unset = "D:/SERVER/1902"),
  winslash = "/",
  mustWork = FALSE
)
timing_ticks_dir <- file.path(server_dir, "TimingTicks")

tif_files <- list.files(server_dir, pattern = "\\.tif$", full.names = TRUE)
tif_files_sans_ext <- tools::file_path_sans_ext(tif_files)
# Keep date ranges only so paths can be reconstructed portably.
basenames <- sub("^AGC-D-", "", basename(tif_files_sans_ext))

# Initialize an empty plot
plot(NA, xlim = c(1, 1900000), ylim = c(300, 1200), xlab = "X", ylab = "Y", main = "All Lines Plot")

# Define colors for top and bottom lines
top_color <- "black"
bot_color <- "black"

# Initialize cumulative_x to track the starting x-value for each line
cumulative_x <- 1

# Loop through each file
for (i in seq_along(basenames)) {
  # Construct the path to the RDS file
  rds_path <- file.path(server_dir, paste0("AGC-D-", basenames[i], ".tif-Digitized.rds"))
  # Read the RDS file
  img_rds <- readRDS(rds_path)
  
  # Extract the top and bottom trace matrices
  bot_line <- img_rds$BottomTraceMatrix
  top_line <- img_rds$TopTraceMatrix
  
  # Skip if both bot_line and top_line are NULL
  if (is.null(bot_line) && is.null(top_line)) {
    next
  }
  
  # Plot the bot_line if it exists
  if (!is.null(bot_line)) {
    x_values_bot <- cumulative_x:(cumulative_x + length(bot_line) - 1)
    lines(x_values_bot, bot_line, col = bot_color, lwd = 2)
    
    # Update cumulative_x to the end of the bot_line
    cumulative_x <- cumulative_x + length(bot_line)
  }
  
  # Plot the top_line if it exists
  if (!is.null(top_line)) {
    # Translate the top_line so its first value matches the last value of bot_line
    if (!is.null(bot_line)) {
      translation_value <- bot_line[length(bot_line)] - top_line[1]
      top_line <- top_line + translation_value
    }
    
    # Plot the top_line starting at cumulative_x
    x_values_top <- cumulative_x:(cumulative_x + length(top_line) - 1)
    lines(x_values_top, top_line, col = top_color, lwd = 2)
    
    # Update cumulative_x to the end of the top_line
    cumulative_x <- cumulative_x + length(top_line)
  }
}

```

```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)

# Initialize a data frame to store all line data
all_lines <- data.frame(x = numeric(), y = numeric(), line_type = character())

# Initialize cumulative_x to track the starting x-value for each line
cumulative_x <- 1

# Loop through each file to collect data
for (i in seq_along(basenames)) {
  # Construct the path to the RDS file
  rds_path <- file.path(server_dir, paste0("AGC-D-", basenames[i], ".tif-Digitized.rds"))
  
  # Check if the file exists
  if (!file.exists(rds_path)) {
    warning(paste("File does not exist:", rds_path))
    next
  }
  
  # Read the RDS file
  img_rds <- readRDS(rds_path)
  
  # Extract the top and bottom trace matrices
  bot_line <- img_rds$BottomTraceMatrix
  top_line <- img_rds$TopTraceMatrix
  
  # Skip if both bot_line and top_line are NULL
  if (is.null(bot_line) && is.null(top_line)) {
    next
  }
  
  # Add bot_line data to the data frame
  if (!is.null(bot_line)) {
    x_values_bot <- cumulative_x:(cumulative_x + length(bot_line) - 1)
    all_lines <- all_lines %>%
      bind_rows(data.frame(x = x_values_bot, y = bot_line, line_type = "Bottom Line"))
    
    # Update cumulative_x to the end of the bot_line
    cumulative_x <- cumulative_x + length(bot_line)
  }
  
  # Add top_line data to the data frame
  if (!is.null(top_line)) {
    # Translate the top_line so its first value matches the last value of bot_line
    if (!is.null(bot_line)) {
      translation_value <- bot_line[length(bot_line)] - top_line[1]
      top_line <- top_line + translation_value
    }
    
    # Add top_line data to the data frame
    x_values_top <- cumulative_x:(cumulative_x + length(top_line) - 1)
    all_lines <- all_lines %>%
      bind_rows(data.frame(x = x_values_top, y = top_line, line_type = "Top Line"))
    
    # Update cumulative_x to the end of the top_line
    cumulative_x <- cumulative_x + length(top_line)
  }
}

# Plot using ggplot2
ggplot(all_lines, aes(x = x, y = y, color = line_type)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Top Line" = "black", "Bottom Line" = "black")) +
  labs(x = "X", y = "Y", title = "All Lines Plot", color = "Line Type") +
  theme_minimal()
```

```{r, fig.height = 8}
# Define the base name (without extension)
base_name <- "AGC-D-19020102-19020104"

# Construct paths using the base name
tif_path <- file.path(server_dir, paste0(base_name, ".tif"))
rds_path <- file.path(server_dir, paste0(base_name, ".tif-Digitized.rds"))
# For traces
img_rds <- readRDS(rds_path)

# Load and process the image
img <- image_read(tif_path)
if (image_info(img)$width < image_info(img)$height) {
  img <- image_rotate(img, -90)
}

# For timing ticks
rds_path <- file.path(timing_ticks_dir, paste0(base_name, ".rds"))
tt <- readRDS(rds_path)

plot(img)

  # Data lines
  lines(seq(from = img_rds$TopTraceStartEnds$Start + 125, to = img_rds$TopTraceStartEnds$End + 125),
       y =  img_rds$TopTraceMatrix + 96, col = "red")

  lines(seq(from = img_rds$BottomTraceStartEnds$Start + 125, to = img_rds$BottomTraceStartEnds$End + 125),
       y =  img_rds$BottomTraceMatrix + 96, col = "red")
  
for (i in seq_along(tt[[2]][["median_X"]])) {
  segments(
    x0 = tt[[2]][["median_X"]][i],  # x position for the line
    x1 = tt[[2]][["median_X"]][i],  # same x for vertical line
    y0 = 900,           # starting y position
    y1 = 1100,           # ending y position
    col = "red",        # line color
    lwd = 1             # line width
  )
}
  
  for (i in seq_along(tt[[2]][["median_X"]])) {
  segments(
    x0 = tt[[2]][["median_X"]][i],  # x position for the line
    x1 = tt[[2]][["median_X"]][i],  # same x for vertical line
    y0 = 300,           # starting y position
    y1 = 400,           # ending y position
    col = "red",        # line color
    lwd = 1             # line width
  )
}

    for (i in seq_along(tt[[1]][["median_X"]])) {
  segments(
    x0 = tt[[1]][["median_X"]][i],  # x position for the line
    x1 = tt[[1]][["median_X"]][i],  # same x for vertical line
    y0 = 600,           # starting y position
    y1 = 800,           # ending y position
    col = "green",        # line color
    lwd = 1             # line width
  )
  }

  for (i in seq_along(tt[[1]][["median_X"]])) {
  segments(
    x0 = tt[[1]][["median_X"]][i],  # x position for the line
    x1 = tt[[1]][["median_X"]][i],  # same x for vertical line
    y0 = 100,           # starting y position
    y1 = 200,           # ending y position
    col = "green",        # line color
    lwd = 1             # line width
  )
  }
```
